first_run.rationale: The two evaluations are highly consistent, with identical scores and nearly identical reasoning in the justification, strengths, and concerns sections. The minor differences in wording and emphasis fall well within the range of normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any change in the assessment of the candidate's skills. The evaluation remains focused on the candidate's lack of C++ and large-scale cloud experience, with no language that keys off the location change from Berlin to Bangalore.
